description: Full-stack SaaS application with auth, billing, and core product loop

typical_tasks.description: Design database schema — users, subscriptions, core domain tables. Output: SQL migration files.
Implement authentication — sign up, login, session management, password reset. Use the stack from T1 schema.
Build core API endpoints — CRUD for main domain objects. Follow RESTful conventions. Include input validation.
Implement billing integration — Stripe subscription checkout, webhook handler, plan enforcement middleware.
Build frontend UI — dashboard layout, auth pages, core product screens. Use shadcn/ui + Tailwind.
Write integration tests — auth flow, billing webhooks, key API endpoints. Use pytest or vitest.
Configure deployment — Vercel for frontend, environment variables, production database. Write deploy checklist.
